New Stage B labels remain pending project-owner approval for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AE Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

uncertain.reason: Relevant under UAE PDPL sensitivities but not covered by the allowed special-category rules list.

Signals MAR-style restricted persons and closed period context but not directly mapped to an allowed MNPI rule token.
